rewrite.text:
PROVE plus_zero_rw: ∀n. n + 0 = n  
BEGIN  
ASSUME n : ℕ  
GOAL: n + 0 = n  
INDUCTION n  
PROVE BASE_CASE: n = 0  
FACT h1: 0 + 0 = 0 [BY definition_of_add]  
THEREFORE 0 + 0 = 0 [BY h1]  
CONCLUDE: 0 + 0 = 0 [QED]  
PROVE INDUCTIVE_CASE: n = S m  
ASSUME m : ℕ  
INDUCTIVE_HYPOTHESIS ih: m + 0 = m  
SINCE n = S m:  
FACT h2: S m + 0 = S (m + 0) [BY plus_succ_rw]  
THEREFORE S m + 0 = S m [BY h2, ih]  
CONCLUDE: S m + 0 = S m [QED]  
CONCLUDE: ∀n. n + 0 = n [BY induction]  
END

skeleton.text:
intros n.
induction n.
admit.
admit.
